ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitalizations" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospitalization entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the hospitalization record */,
  "icu_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases admitted to an ICU */,
  "hospital_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases admitted to a hospital */,
  "cumulative_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of hospitalizations */,
  "cumulative_icu_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Cumulative total of ICU hospitalizations */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hospital */,
  "admission_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the admission type (ICU or General) */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge */,
  "discharge_status" TEXT /* Status of the patient upon discharge (e.g., recovered, transferred, deceased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_admission_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_type_id") REFERENCES admission_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalizations_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the hospital */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of beds in the hospital */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds in the hospital */,
  "current_occupancy" REAL /* Current occupancy rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the occupancy was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "icu_admissions" (
  "icu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ICU admission entry */,
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospitalization ID */,
  "icu_specialist" TEXT /* Name of the ICU specialist responsible for the admission */,
  "admission_time" TEXT /* Time of ICU admission */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the patient */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge from the ICU */,
  "discharge_status" TEXT /* Status of the patient upon discharge from the ICU (e.g., transferred, recovered, deceased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("icu_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icu_admissions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES hospitalizations ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_icu_admissions_admission_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_id") REFERENCES hospitalizations ("admission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_management_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., doctor, nurse, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hospital */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., ICU, Pediatrics, Administration) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for quick contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_management_users_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitalization_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalizations in the report */,
  "total_icu_admissions" INTEGER /* Total number of ICU admissions in the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hospital */,
  "admission_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the admission type (ICU or General) */,
  "total_beds_occupied" INTEGER /* Total number of beds occupied at the time of the report */,
  "icu_beds_occupied" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds occupied at the time of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_reports_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES hospital_management_users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospitalization_reports_admission_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("admission_type_id") REFERENCES admission_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the admission type (e.g., ICU, General) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the admission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
